user.title: Connect to Husqvarna
user.description: Enter the credentials from your application on the Husqvarna Developer Portal.

data_description.client_id: The application key from your Husqvarna developer account.
data_description.client_secret: The application secret from your Husqvarna developer account.

api_type.title: Select API
api_type.description: Choose which Husqvarna API to connect. You can add both by setting up the integration twice.

location.title: Select your garden
location.description: Multiple gardens were found on your account. Select the one you want to add.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate
reauth_confirm.description: Your credentials are no longer valid. Please enter your application credentials again.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Check your application key and secret on the Husqvarna Developer Portal.
error.forbidden: API access denied. Ensure the Gardena Smart System API is connected to your application in the Husqvarna Developer Portal.
error.automower_not_connected: The Automower Connect API is not connected to your application. Enable it in the Husqvarna Developer Portal under Connected APIs.
error.rate_limited: API rate limit reached or temporarily blocked. Wait a few minutes and try again, or create a new application in the Husqvarna Developer Portal.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the API. Check your network connection and try again.

start_watering.name: Start watering
start_watering.description: Start watering a valve for a specific duration, overriding the schedule.

turn_on_for.name: Turn on for
turn_on_for.description: Turn on a smart power socket for a specific duration.

override_schedule.name: Override schedule
override_schedule.description: Force the mower to mow for a specific duration, ignoring its schedule.

websocket_connection_failed.title: Gardena real-time connection lost
websocket_connection_failed.description: The WebSocket connection to the Gardena Smart System cloud has failed. The integration is now relying on polling (every 30 minutes) for device updates instead of real-time push. Check your internet connection and the Husqvarna service status. The issue will be resolved automatically when the connection is re-established.

automower_websocket_connection_failed.title: Automower real-time connection lost
automower_websocket_connection_failed.description: The WebSocket connection to the Automower Connect cloud has failed. The integration is now relying on polling (every 15 minutes) for device updates instead of real-time push. Check your internet connection and the Husqvarna service status. The issue will be resolved automatically when the connection is re-established.

command_failed.message: Failed to send command to device: {error}

command_throttled.message: Commands are being sent too quickly. Please wait a few seconds between commands to avoid exceeding the API rate limit.
